The 10 stock and bond funds with the biggest Russia exposure

holdings.infoBox: DVYE is an equity ETF with a total of 148 individual holdings. The top holdings are Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. - Petrobras stock at 3.56%, Vale S.A. at 3.44%, Evergreen Marine Corporation (Taiwan) at 3.43%, China Construction Bank at 3.03%, and Grupo Financiero Banorte at 2.43%.

overview.description: The iShares Emerging Markets Dividend ETF (DVYE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of high-dividend-paying emerging markets companies. DVYE was launched on Feb 23, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.text: Global X SuperDividend ETF ($SDIV), iShares Emerging Markets Dividend ETF ($DVYE), and Global X SuperDividend US ETF ($DIV) are among the top high-yield dividend ETFs. SDIV is the best choice…

data.title: Russia-Ukraine: How the top stock and bond funds exposed to Russia are performing
data.text: Yahoo Finance's Jared Blikre breaks down how Russian stocks are trading at Monday's market open.

data.title: The 10 stock and bond funds with the biggest Russia exposure
data.text: A handful of stock and bond funds have above-average exposure to Russia. Some have taken big hits due to Western sanctions aimed at crippling Russia's economy.
